hooks.command: bash -c 'cd /c/Users/honsf/DEVELOP/scad-forge/previewer && set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null; set +a && if netstat.exe -ano 2>/dev/null | grep -q "LISTENING.*:3000 "; then echo "Previewer already running on port 3000"; else node_modules/.bin/vite --host --port 3000 > /tmp/scad-forge-previewer.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && echo "Previewer started on port 3000"; fi && if tailscale.exe serve status 2>&1 | grep -q 3000; then echo "Tailscale serve already active"; else tailscale.exe serve --bg 3000 2>&1 && echo "Tailscale serve started"; fi'
